item.title: Kozaki Osuchowskie
item.description: Kozaki Osuchowskie [kɔˈzaki ɔsuˈxɔfskʲɛ] is a village in the administrative district of Gmina Łukowa, within Biłgoraj County, Lublin Voivodeship, in eastern Poland.[1]

item.title: Tropidozineus cinctulus
item.description: Tropidozineus cinctulus is a species of beetle in the family Cerambycidae. It was described by Monné and Martins in 1976.[1]

item.title: Kim Shin-young (footballer)
item.description: Kim Shin-young (Korean: 김신영; born 16 June 1983), is a South Korean football goalkeeper.

item.title: Andrew Douglas Young
item.description: Andrew Douglas Young (1881 – 22 June 1950), commonly referred to as A. D. Young, was an accountant and stockbroker in South Australia.

item.title: Tom Magrann
item.description: Thomas Joseph Magrann (born December 9, 1963) is an American former Major League Baseball player. A catcher, Magrann played for the Cleveland Indians in 1989.
